title: Falling Paddy, Rising Crisis: A New Future with Aquaculture
description: In this video, the Centre for Public Policy Research, Kochi, Kerala, presents key insights from its research on Kerala’s paddy cultivation crisis, focusing on the need for policy flexibility, integrated farming, and enabling aquaculture-led agricultural transformation. Paddy cultivation, once […] The post Falling Paddy, Rising Crisis: A New Future with Aquaculture appeared first on Centre for Public Policy Research (CPPR).
